  • About this item
  • Industry-leading noise cancellation with Dual Noise Sensor technology
  • Up to 30-hour battery life with quick charging
  • Touch sensor controls for easy operation
  • Speak-to-chat technology automatically pauses playback

Premium noise cancelling headphones with exceptional sound quality. Features LDAC for high-resolution audio transmission and multipoint connection to pair with two Bluetooth devices simultaneously.
